Pescatarian Restaurants in Lake Buena Vista

Browse 4 restaurants in Lake Buena Vista, Central Florida, that offer pescatarian options. Each listing shows its latest health inspection grade and diner ratings.

4 pescatarian restaurants

  • A 100 B
    BOATHOUSE RESTAURANT American ★ 4.7 (20517) Lake Buena Vista · Orange County GFDF +4 more Inspected Jun 2026
  • A 100 M
    MORIMOTO Japanese ★ 4.2 (6780) Lake Buena Vista · Orange County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected May 2026
  • A 90 S
    STK ORLANDO LLC LOWER & MAIN LEVELS American ★ 4.7 (36817) Lake Buena Vista · Orange County GFDF +3 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • B 84 S
